raw.subject: Your Omaha page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I love the rustic vibe of your mobile detailing photos - the old vans and muddy boots really set the tone for a local business. 

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, and as a mobile service that travels around Omaha, you might be missing out on potential bookings and calls from people who stumble upon your business online.

I took a look at your Facebook page and sketched out a simple page idea that incorporates your services overview, photo gallery, contact section, and even a map to show your Omaha area coverage. The hero headline is even based on one of your Facebook photos!

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/ward-wash-mobile-detailing-omaha

Let's discuss how a simple website like this could work for your business, and I can provide a flat fee for local projects like yours. If you're interested, feel free to reply or we can schedule a quick call to chat details.
